15 Insane New Google Gemini Updates (Most are FREE!)

Google just released a massive wave of updates for Gemini, Notebook LM, and Chrome that change everything. This video covers 15 game-changing features including cinematic video generation, a full music production suite, and AI browser agents that do the work for you.

00:00 - Intro: 15 Massive Updates
00:50 - Cinematic Video in Notebook LM
02:22 - New Infographic Styles & Editing
03:49 - Producer AI: Full Music Creation
04:45 - Nano Banana 2: Free Image Gen
05:37 - Pomelli: Instant Marketing Ads
06:03 - Chrome Auto Browse & Agents
07:33 - Gemini 3 Deep Think Models
